id='1cdc5eb8-19d1-46a8-a33d-cf90e7573716' version=5 score=0.58043313 payload={'text': 'Car details
Mahindra XUV700 — Overview
• Model: Compact SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Style: 5-door SUV.
• Seating: 6- or 7-seater options.
• Engine Options:
o Petrol: 2.0 L turbo mStallion (~1997 cc) ~197 PS.
o Diesel: 2.2 L mHawk (~2184 cc) ~182 PS.
• Transmission:
o 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
• Drive Options: FWD standard; AWD optional on some diesel variants.
• Fuel Type: Petrol / Diesel.
Price (India) — Ex-Showroom
• Range (approx): ₹13.66 Lakh – ₹23.71 Lakh (Variant-wise ex-showroom).
o Base petrol/manual: ~₹13.66 L & up.
o Top diesel-AT/AWD: ~₹23.71 L.
• Variants: MX, AX3, AX5, AX7, AX7L (with petrol & diesel, manual & automatic options).
On-Road Price (City Examples)
On-road prices include RTO (registration), insurance, and statutory charges; they differ by city/state:
New Delhi
• Ex-Showroom (MX 7Str Petrol): ₹13.65 L.
• RTO: ~₹2.26 L (varies)
• Insurance: ~₹0.89 L
On-Road ≈ ₹16.8 L for base model.
EMI shown ≈ ₹26,000-₹33,000/mo (typical EMI varies by loan terms).
Chennai
• Base model ≈ ₹17.7 L (on-road).
Bangalore
• Base model ≈ ₹17.56 L (on-road).
(On-road pricing for other cities typically falls between ₹16 L – ₹27 L depending on variant and
regional taxes.)
Specifications
Engine & Performance
• Petrol: ~2.0 L turbo, ~197 PS, ~380 Nm torque.
• Diesel: ~2.2 L turbo, ~182 PS, ~450 Nm torque.
• Transmission: 6-speed Manual / 6-speed Automatic.
Mileage
• Petrol Manual: ~15 km/l.
• Petrol Automatic: ~13-14 km/l.
• Diesel Manual: ~17 km/l.
• Diesel Automatic: ~16.5 km/l.
Top Speed & Pickup
• Official figures vary by variant; typical SUVs with similar engines can reach ~180-200 km/h
top speed (manufacturer does not always publish exact top speed for every model).
• 0-100 km/h pickup is usually in the 8.5–10.5 sec range for petrol and ~9–11 sec for diesel
(third-party tests). (Exact figures vary by variant / test.)
Dimensions
• Length ~4695 mm
• Width ~1890 mm
• Height ~1755 mm
• Wheelbase ~2750 mm
Colour Options
Common colours offered (varies by variant & year):
• Everest White
• Stealth Black
• Valyrian Silver
• Deep Forest
• Burnt Sienna
• Midnight Black DT
…and a few special dual-tone options.
Features (Highlights)
• Level-2 ADAS safety (lane assist, adaptive cruise, etc.).
• 5-Star Global NCAP safety rating (tested configuration).
• Dual 10″ infotainment + digital cluster.
• Panoramic sunroof.
• 7 airbags (varies by variant).
• Quick-shift Torque Converter automatic option.
(Exact features differ by variant — mid-trim and top-trim get more tech & comfort features.
EMI / Financing
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate & tenure. Example (illustrative):
• On-road ~₹17 L, 10% down payment, 7.5-9.5% interest, 5-year tenure → EMI typically
₹30,000 – ₹38,000 per month (approx).
(Specific banks / offers change frequently.)
Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO/Registration Charges: Vary by state — metro cities are generally higher (e.g., Delhi
~₹2.26 L for base).
• Insurance: Depends on engine size, insurer, add-ons — typically ₹0.80 L – ₹1.20 L for new
SUV.
• Optional accessories, extended warranties, & cornering sensors add extra cost.
Key Takeaways
Category Details
Ex-Showroom Price ₹13.66 L – ₹23.71 L (varies by variant)
On-Road Price (Example) ₹16.8 L – ₹28.8 L (Delhi)
Mileage 13 – 17 km/l (fuel & transmission dependent)
Transmission 6-speed Manual / Auto
Fuel Petrol & Diesel
Features ADAS, digital displays, sunroof, 5★ safety
Mahindra Thar — Overview
• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Type: Compact SUV with strong off-road capability.
• Drive: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) & 4-wheel drive (4WD) depending on variant.
• Fuel Types: Petrol & Diesel options available.
• Transmission: Manual & Automatic options.
Prices — India (2026)
Ex-Showroom Price (Indicative)
• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)
Quick Summary Table
Category Detail
Base Ex-Showroom Price ₹9.99 L – ₹12.5 Lk*(approx)
Top Ex-Showroom Price ₹16.99 Lk*(approx)
On-Road Price Range ~₹11 L – ₹21 L+ (Metro & Tier-I cities)
Fuel Types Petrol & Diesel
Transmission Manual & Automatic
Drive Options RWD & 4WD
Mileage (Approx) 9 – 11 km/l (ARAI/real-world)
EMI Example ~₹28,000 – ₹37,000/month (5 yr term, 9% rate)
Key Features Off-road capability, infotainment, safety tech

id='2fce1e99-9a45-4c4b-9e64-31362e60dc55' version=1 score=0.3736255 payload={'text': 'Car Booking Policy Document
Manufacturer: Mahindra & Mahindra
1. Booking Process
(cid:127) Customers may book any available Mahindra vehicle through authorized dealerships or the
official website.
(cid:127) A booking amount ranging from n10,000 to n50,000 is required depending on the vehicle
model.
(cid:127) Booking confirmation is subject to payment verification and availability.
2. Payment Terms
(cid:127) The remaining balance must be paid before vehicle delivery.
(cid:127) Accepted payment methods include bank transfer, loan financing, UPI, and debit/credit cards.
(cid:127) Loan approvals are subject to bank policies.
3. Cancellation Policy
(cid:127) Customers may cancel their booking at any time before vehicle dispatch.
(cid:127) A nominal administrative fee of n1,000 may be deducted from the booking amount.
(cid:127) Cancellations after vehicle dispatch may incur additional logistics charges.
4. Refund Policy
(cid:127) Refunds will be processed within 7–10 working days from cancellation approval.
(cid:127) Refunds will be credited to the original payment method used during booking.
(cid:127) Delays may occur due to banking procedures.
5. Delivery Timeline
(cid:127) Delivery timelines vary by model and location.
(cid:127) Standard delivery period ranges from 2 to 8 weeks depending on demand and stock availability.
(cid:127) Customers will receive SMS and email notifications regarding delivery status.
6. Warranty & Service
(cid:127) All Mahindra vehicles come with a standard manufacturer warranty.
(cid:127) Extended warranty packages are available at additional cost.
(cid:127) Free service schedules are provided as per the vehicle manual.
7. Modification & Customization
(cid:127) Factory-approved accessories may be added before delivery.
(cid:127) Custom modifications may impact warranty coverage.
8. Force Majeure
(cid:127) Mahindra & Mahindra shall not be liable for delays caused by natural disasters, government
regulations, supply chain disruptions, or unforeseen events.
9. Legal Jurisdiction
(cid:127) All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Mumbai, India.
', 'domain': 'car_booking'} vector=None shard_key=None order_value=None

id='61b24205-3bb4-4909-ac0a-d1c325af7bce' version=3 score=0.291601 payload={'text': 'Vehicle Booking Cancellation Rules
1. General Cancellation Policy
(cid:127) Customers may cancel their vehicle booking prior to delivery.
(cid:127) Cancellation requests must be submitted through authorized dealership or official website.
(cid:127) Cancellation approval is subject to internal verification.
2. Refund Processing Time
(cid:127) Refunds are processed within 5–10 working days from cancellation approval.
(cid:127) Refund timelines may vary depending on banking procedures.
3. Cancellation Before Allocation
(cid:127) Full booking amount will be refunded after deducting minimal transaction fees (if applicable).
4. Cancellation After Allocation
(cid:127) A processing fee may be deducted if the vehicle has already been allocated.
(cid:127) Customization or accessory charges may be non-refundable.
5. Cancellation After Dispatch
(cid:127) Logistics and handling charges may apply if the vehicle has been dispatched to dealership.
6. Loan-Based Bookings
(cid:127) If booking was made via financing, cancellation must comply with bank terms.
(cid:127) Refund may be routed through financing partner.
7. Non-Refundable Charges
(cid:127) Certain promotional deposits and special edition bookings may include non-refundable
components.
8. Legal Jurisdiction
(cid:127) All disputes shall be subject to jurisdiction of applicable local courts.
', 'domain': 'car_booking'} vector=None shard_key=None order_value=None

id='2fce1e99-9a45-4c4b-9e64-31362e60dc55' version=1 score=0.15805463 payload={'text': 'Car Booking Policy Document
Manufacturer: Mahindra & Mahindra
1. Booking Process
(cid:127) Customers may book any available Mahindra vehicle through authorized dealerships or the
official website.
(cid:127) A booking amount ranging from n10,000 to n50,000 is required depending on the vehicle
model.
(cid:127) Booking confirmation is subject to payment verification and availability.
2. Payment Terms
(cid:127) The remaining balance must be paid before vehicle delivery.
(cid:127) Accepted payment methods include bank transfer, loan financing, UPI, and debit/credit cards.
(cid:127) Loan approvals are subject to bank policies.
3. Cancellation Policy
(cid:127) Customers may cancel their booking at any time before vehicle dispatch.
(cid:127) A nominal administrative fee of n1,000 may be deducted from the booking amount.
(cid:127) Cancellations after vehicle dispatch may incur additional logistics charges.
4. Refund Policy
(cid:127) Refunds will be processed within 7–10 working days from cancellation approval.
(cid:127) Refunds will be credited to the original payment method used during booking.
(cid:127) Delays may occur due to banking procedures.
5. Delivery Timeline
(cid:127) Delivery timelines vary by model and location.
(cid:127) Standard delivery period ranges from 2 to 8 weeks depending on demand and stock availability.
(cid:127) Customers will receive SMS and email notifications regarding delivery status.
6. Warranty & Service
(cid:127) All Mahindra vehicles come with a standard manufacturer warranty.
(cid:127) Extended warranty packages are available at additional cost.
(cid:127) Free service schedules are provided as per the vehicle manual.
7. Modification & Customization
(cid:127) Factory-approved accessories may be added before delivery.
(cid:127) Custom modifications may impact warranty coverage.
8. Force Majeure
(cid:127) Mahindra & Mahindra shall not be liable for delays caused by natural disasters, government
regulations, supply chain disruptions, or unforeseen events.
9. Legal Jurisdiction
(cid:127) All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Mumbai, India.
', 'domain': 'car_booking'} vector=None shard_key=None order_value=None

id='61b24205-3bb4-4909-ac0a-d1c325af7bce' version=3 score=0.11737112 payload={'text': 'Vehicle Booking Cancellation Rules
1. General Cancellation Policy
(cid:127) Customers may cancel their vehicle booking prior to delivery.
(cid:127) Cancellation requests must be submitted through authorized dealership or official website.
(cid:127) Cancellation approval is subject to internal verification.
2. Refund Processing Time
(cid:127) Refunds are processed within 5–10 working days from cancellation approval.
(cid:127) Refund timelines may vary depending on banking procedures.
3. Cancellation Before Allocation
(cid:127) Full booking amount will be refunded after deducting minimal transaction fees (if applicable).
4. Cancellation After Allocation
(cid:127) A processing fee may be deducted if the vehicle has already been allocated.
(cid:127) Customization or accessory charges may be non-refundable.
5. Cancellation After Dispatch
(cid:127) Logistics and handling charges may apply if the vehicle has been dispatched to dealership.
6. Loan-Based Bookings
(cid:127) If booking was made via financing, cancellation must comply with bank terms.
(cid:127) Refund may be routed through financing partner.
7. Non-Refundable Charges
(cid:127) Certain promotional deposits and special edition bookings may include non-refundable
components.
8. Legal Jurisdiction
(cid:127) All disputes shall be subject to jurisdiction of applicable local courts.
', 'domain': 'car_booking'} vector=None shard_key=None order_value=None

id='2fce1e99-9a45-4c4b-9e64-31362e60dc55' version=1 score=0.3804314 payload={'text': 'Car Booking Policy Document
Manufacturer: Mahindra & Mahindra
1. Booking Process
(cid:127) Customers may book any available Mahindra vehicle through authorized dealerships or the
official website.
(cid:127) A booking amount ranging from n10,000 to n50,000 is required depending on the vehicle
model.
(cid:127) Booking confirmation is subject to payment verification and availability.
2. Payment Terms
(cid:127) The remaining balance must be paid before vehicle delivery.
(cid:127) Accepted payment methods include bank transfer, loan financing, UPI, and debit/credit cards.
(cid:127) Loan approvals are subject to bank policies.
3. Cancellation Policy
(cid:127) Customers may cancel their booking at any time before vehicle dispatch.
(cid:127) A nominal administrative fee of n1,000 may be deducted from the booking amount.
(cid:127) Cancellations after vehicle dispatch may incur additional logistics charges.
4. Refund Policy
(cid:127) Refunds will be processed within 7–10 working days from cancellation approval.
(cid:127) Refunds will be credited to the original payment method used during booking.
(cid:127) Delays may occur due to banking procedures.
5. Delivery Timeline
(cid:127) Delivery timelines vary by model and location.
(cid:127) Standard delivery period ranges from 2 to 8 weeks depending on demand and stock availability.
(cid:127) Customers will receive SMS and email notifications regarding delivery status.
6. Warranty & Service
(cid:127) All Mahindra vehicles come with a standard manufacturer warranty.
(cid:127) Extended warranty packages are available at additional cost.
(cid:127) Free service schedules are provided as per the vehicle manual.
7. Modification & Customization
(cid:127) Factory-approved accessories may be added before delivery.
(cid:127) Custom modifications may impact warranty coverage.
8. Force Majeure
(cid:127) Mahindra & Mahindra shall not be liable for delays caused by natural disasters, government
regulations, supply chain disruptions, or unforeseen events.
9. Legal Jurisdiction
(cid:127) All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Mumbai, India.
', 'domain': 'car_booking'} vector=None shard_key=None order_value=None

id='61b24205-3bb4-4909-ac0a-d1c325af7bce' version=3 score=0.28129733 payload={'text': 'Vehicle Booking Cancellation Rules
1. General Cancellation Policy
(cid:127) Customers may cancel their vehicle booking prior to delivery.
(cid:127) Cancellation requests must be submitted through authorized dealership or official website.
(cid:127) Cancellation approval is subject to internal verification.
2. Refund Processing Time
(cid:127) Refunds are processed within 5–10 working days from cancellation approval.
(cid:127) Refund timelines may vary depending on banking procedures.
3. Cancellation Before Allocation
(cid:127) Full booking amount will be refunded after deducting minimal transaction fees (if applicable).
4. Cancellation After Allocation
(cid:127) A processing fee may be deducted if the vehicle has already been allocated.
(cid:127) Customization or accessory charges may be non-refundable.
5. Cancellation After Dispatch
(cid:127) Logistics and handling charges may apply if the vehicle has been dispatched to dealership.
6. Loan-Based Bookings
(cid:127) If booking was made via financing, cancellation must comply with bank terms.
(cid:127) Refund may be routed through financing partner.
7. Non-Refundable Charges
(cid:127) Certain promotional deposits and special edition bookings may include non-refundable
components.
8. Legal Jurisdiction
(cid:127) All disputes shall be subject to jurisdiction of applicable local courts.

Manufacturer: Mahindra & Mahindra
1. Booking Process

model.
(cid:127) Booking confirmation is subject to payment verification and availability.

(cid:127) The remaining balance must be paid before vehicle delivery.
(cid:127) Accepted payment methods include bank transfer, loan financing, UPI, and debit/credit cards.
(cid:127) Loan approvals are subject to bank policies.

(cid:127) Customers may cancel their booking at any time before vehicle dispatch.

(cid:127) Cancellations after vehicle dispatch may incur additional logistics charges.

(cid:127) Refunds will be processed within 7–10 working days from cancellation approval.

(cid:127) Delays may occur due to banking procedures.

(cid:127) Delivery timelines vary by model and location.

Car details
Mahindra XUV700 — Overview
• Model: Compact SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Style: 5-door SUV.
• Seating: 6- or 7-seater options.
• Engine Options:
o Petrol: 2.0 L turbo mStallion (~1997 cc) ~197 PS.
o Diesel: 2.2 L mHawk (~2184 cc) ~182 PS.
• Transmission:
o 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
• Drive Options: FWD standard; AWD optional on some diesel variants.
• Fuel Type: Petrol / Diesel.
Price (India) — Ex-Showroom
• Range (approx): ₹13.66 Lakh – ₹23.71 Lakh (Variant-wise ex-showroom).
o Base petrol/manual: ~₹13.66 L & up.
o Top diesel-AT/AWD: ~₹23.71 L.
• Variants: MX, AX3, AX5, AX7, AX7L (with petrol & diesel, manual & automatic options).
On-Road Price (City Examples)
On-road prices include RTO (registration), insurance, and statutory charges; they differ by city/state:
New Delhi
• Ex-Showroom (MX 7Str Petrol): ₹13.65 L.
• RTO: ~₹2.26 L (varies)
• Insurance: ~₹0.89 L
On-Road ≈ ₹16.8 L for base model.
EMI shown ≈ ₹26,000-₹33,000/mo (typical EMI varies by loan terms).
Chennai
• Base model ≈ ₹17.7 L (on-road).
Bangalore
• Base model ≈ ₹17.56 L (on-road).
(On-road pricing for other cities typically falls between ₹16 L – ₹27 L depending on variant and
regional taxes.)
Specifications
Engine & Performance
• Petrol: ~2.0 L turbo, ~197 PS, ~380 Nm torque.
• Diesel: ~2.2 L turbo, ~182 PS, ~450 Nm torque.
• Transmission: 6-speed Manual / 6-speed Automatic.
Mileage
• Petrol Manual: ~15 km/l.
• Petrol Automatic: ~13-14 km/l.
• Diesel Manual: ~17 km/l.
• Diesel Automatic: ~16.5 km/l.
Top Speed & Pickup
• Official figures vary by variant; typical SUVs with similar engines can reach ~180-200 km/h
top speed (manufacturer does not always publish exact top speed for every model).
• 0-100 km/h pickup is usually in the 8.5–10.5 sec range for petrol and ~9–11 sec for diesel
(third-party tests). (Exact figures vary by variant / test.)
Dimensions
• Length ~4695 mm
• Width ~1890 mm
• Height ~1755 mm
• Wheelbase ~2750 mm
Colour Options
Common colours offered (varies by variant & year):
• Everest White
• Stealth Black
• Valyrian Silver
• Deep Forest
• Burnt Sienna
• Midnight Black DT
…and a few special dual-tone options.
Features (Highlights)
• Level-2 ADAS safety (lane assist, adaptive cruise, etc.).
• 5-Star Global NCAP safety rating (tested configuration).
• Dual 10″ infotainment + digital cluster.
• Panoramic sunroof.
• 7 airbags (varies by variant).
• Quick-shift Torque Converter automatic option.
(Exact features differ by variant — mid-trim and top-trim get more tech & comfort features.
EMI / Financing
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate & tenure. Example (illustrative):
• On-road ~₹17 L, 10% down payment, 7.5-9.5% interest, 5-year tenure → EMI typically
₹30,000 – ₹38,000 per month (approx).
(Specific banks / offers change frequently.)
Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO/Registration Charges: Vary by state — metro cities are generally higher (e.g., Delhi
~₹2.26 L for base).
• Insurance: Depends on engine size, insurer, add-ons — typically ₹0.80 L – ₹1.20 L for new
SUV.
• Optional accessories, extended warranties, & cornering sensors add extra cost.

Mahindra Thar — Overview
• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Type: Compact SUV with strong off-road capability.
• Drive: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) & 4-wheel drive (4WD) depending on variant.
• Fuel Types: Petrol & Diesel options available.
• Transmission: Manual & Automatic options.
Prices — India (2026)
Ex-Showroom Price (Indicative)
• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

New Delhi

• Base model ≈ ₹17.56 L (on-road).

regional taxes.)
Specifications
Engine & Performance
• Petrol: ~2.0 L turbo, ~197 PS, ~380 Nm torque.
• Diesel: ~2.2 L turbo, ~182 PS, ~450 Nm torque.
• Transmission: 6-speed Manual / 6-speed Automatic.
Mileage
• Petrol Manual: ~15 km/l.
• Petrol Automatic: ~13-14 km/l.
• Diesel Manual: ~17 km/l.
• Diesel Automatic: ~16.5 km/l.
Top Speed & Pickup

top speed (manufacturer does not always publish exact top speed for every model).

(third-party tests). (Exact figures vary by variant / test.)
Dimensions
• Length ~4695 mm

• Height ~1755 mm
• Wheelbase ~2750 mm
Colour Options

• Stealth Black

• Burnt Sienna
• Midnight Black DT
…and a few special dual-tone options.
Features (Highlights)
• Level-2 ADAS safety (lane assist, adaptive cruise, etc.).
• 5-Star Global NCAP safety rating (tested configuration).
• Dual 10″ infotainment + digital cluster.
• Panoramic sunroof.
• 7 airbags (varies by variant).
• Quick-shift Torque Converter automatic option.
(Exact features differ by variant — mid-trim and top-trim get more tech & comfort features.

SUV.

• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.

coverage.

• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).

(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:

• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

Car details
Mahindra XUV700 — Overview
• Model: Compact SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Style: 5-door SUV.
• Seating: 6- or 7-seater options.
• Engine Options:
o Petrol: 2.0 L turbo mStallion (~1997 cc) ~197 PS.
o Diesel: 2.2 L mHawk (~2184 cc) ~182 PS.
• Transmission:
o 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
• Drive Options: FWD standard; AWD optional on some diesel variants.
• Fuel Type: Petrol / Diesel.
Price (India) — Ex-Showroom
• Range (approx): ₹13.66 Lakh – ₹23.71 Lakh (Variant-wise ex-showroom).
o Base petrol/manual: ~₹13.66 L & up.
o Top diesel-AT/AWD: ~₹23.71 L.
• Variants: MX, AX3, AX5, AX7, AX7L (with petrol & diesel, manual & automatic options).
On-Road Price (City Examples)
On-road prices include RTO (registration), insurance, and statutory charges; they differ by city/state:
New Delhi
• Ex-Showroom (MX 7Str Petrol): ₹13.65 L.
• RTO: ~₹2.26 L (varies)
• Insurance: ~₹0.89 L
On-Road ≈ ₹16.8 L for base model.
EMI shown ≈ ₹26,000-₹33,000/mo (typical EMI varies by loan terms).
Chennai
• Base model ≈ ₹17.7 L (on-road).
Bangalore
• Base model ≈ ₹17.56 L (on-road).
(On-road pricing for other cities typically falls between ₹16 L – ₹27 L depending on variant and
regional taxes.)
Specifications
Engine & Performance
• Petrol: ~2.0 L turbo, ~197 PS, ~380 Nm torque.
• Diesel: ~2.2 L turbo, ~182 PS, ~450 Nm torque.
• Transmission: 6-speed Manual / 6-speed Automatic.
Mileage
• Petrol Manual: ~15 km/l.
• Petrol Automatic: ~13-14 km/l.
• Diesel Manual: ~17 km/l.
• Diesel Automatic: ~16.5 km/l.
Top Speed & Pickup
• Official figures vary by variant; typical SUVs with similar engines can reach ~180-200 km/h
top speed (manufacturer does not always publish exact top speed for every model).
• 0-100 km/h pickup is usually in the 8.5–10.5 sec range for petrol and ~9–11 sec for diesel
(third-party tests). (Exact figures vary by variant / test.)
Dimensions
• Length ~4695 mm
• Width ~1890 mm
• Height ~1755 mm
• Wheelbase ~2750 mm
Colour Options
Common colours offered (varies by variant & year):
• Everest White
• Stealth Black
• Valyrian Silver
• Deep Forest
• Burnt Sienna
• Midnight Black DT
…and a few special dual-tone options.
Features (Highlights)
• Level-2 ADAS safety (lane assist, adaptive cruise, etc.).
• 5-Star Global NCAP safety rating (tested configuration).
• Dual 10″ infotainment + digital cluster.
• Panoramic sunroof.
• 7 airbags (varies by variant).
• Quick-shift Torque Converter automatic option.
(Exact features differ by variant — mid-trim and top-trim get more tech & comfort features.
EMI / Financing
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate & tenure. Example (illustrative):
• On-road ~₹17 L, 10% down payment, 7.5-9.5% interest, 5-year tenure → EMI typically
₹30,000 – ₹38,000 per month (approx).
(Specific banks / offers change frequently.)
Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO/Registration Charges: Vary by state — metro cities are generally higher (e.g., Delhi
~₹2.26 L for base).
• Insurance: Depends on engine size, insurer, add-ons — typically ₹0.80 L – ₹1.20 L for new
SUV.
• Optional accessories, extended warranties, & cornering sensors add extra cost.

Mahindra Thar — Overview
• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Type: Compact SUV with strong off-road capability.
• Drive: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) & 4-wheel drive (4WD) depending on variant.
• Fuel Types: Petrol & Diesel options available.
• Transmission: Manual & Automatic options.
Prices — India (2026)
Ex-Showroom Price (Indicative)
• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

Mahindra XUV700 — Overview
• Model: Compact SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Style: 5-door SUV.
• Seating: 6- or 7-seater options.
• Engine Options:
o Petrol: 2.0 L turbo mStallion (~1997 cc) ~197 PS.
o Diesel: 2.2 L mHawk (~2184 cc) ~182 PS.
• Transmission:
o 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
• Drive Options: FWD standard; AWD optional on some diesel variants.
• Fuel Type: Petrol / Diesel.
Price (India) — Ex-Showroom
• Range (approx): ₹13.66 Lakh – ₹23.71 Lakh (Variant-wise ex-showroom).
o Base petrol/manual: ~₹13.66 L & up.
o Top diesel-AT/AWD: ~₹23.71 L.
• Variants: MX, AX3, AX5, AX7, AX7L (with petrol & diesel, manual & automatic options).
On-Road Price (City Examples)
On-road prices include RTO (registration), insurance, and statutory charges; they differ by city/state:
New Delhi
• Ex-Showroom (MX 7Str Petrol): ₹13.65 L.
• RTO: ~₹2.26 L (varies)
• Insurance: ~₹0.89 L
On-Road ≈ ₹16.8 L for base model.
EMI shown ≈ ₹26,000-₹33,000/mo (typical EMI varies by loan terms).
Chennai
• Base model ≈ ₹17.7 L (on-road).
Bangalore
• Base model ≈ ₹17.56 L (on-road).
(On-road pricing for other cities typically falls between ₹16 L – ₹27 L depending on variant and
regional taxes.)
Specifications
Engine & Performance
• Petrol: ~2.0 L turbo, ~197 PS, ~380 Nm torque.
• Diesel: ~2.2 L turbo, ~182 PS, ~450 Nm torque.
• Transmission: 6-speed Manual / 6-speed Automatic.
Mileage
• Petrol Manual: ~15 km/l.
• Petrol Automatic: ~13-14 km/l.
• Diesel Manual: ~17 km/l.
• Diesel Automatic: ~16.5 km/l.
Top Speed & Pickup
• Official figures vary by variant; typical SUVs with similar engines can reach ~180-200 km/h
top speed (manufacturer does not always publish exact top speed for every model).
• 0-100 km/h pickup is usually in the 8.5–10.5 sec range for petrol and ~9–11 sec for diesel
(third-party tests). (Exact figures vary by variant / test.)
Dimensions
• Length ~4695 mm
• Width ~1890 mm
• Height ~1755 mm
• Wheelbase ~2750 mm
Colour Options
Common colours offered (varies by variant & year):
• Everest White
• Stealth Black
• Valyrian Silver
• Deep Forest
• Burnt Sienna
• Midnight Black DT
…and a few special dual-tone options.
Features (Highlights)
• Level-2 ADAS safety (lane assist, adaptive cruise, etc.).
• 5-Star Global NCAP safety rating (tested configuration).
• Dual 10″ infotainment + digital cluster.
• Panoramic sunroof.
• 7 airbags (varies by variant).
• Quick-shift Torque Converter automatic option.
(Exact features differ by variant — mid-trim and top-trim get more tech & comfort features.
EMI / Financing
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate & tenure. Example (illustrative):
• On-road ~₹17 L, 10% down payment, 7.5-9.5% interest, 5-year tenure → EMI typically
₹30,000 – ₹38,000 per month (approx).
(Specific banks / offers change frequently.)
Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO/Registration Charges: Vary by state — metro cities are generally higher (e.g., Delhi
~₹2.26 L for base).
• Insurance: Depends on engine size, insurer, add-ons — typically ₹0.80 L – ₹1.20 L for new
SUV.
• Optional accessories, extended warranties, & cornering sensors add extra cost.

Mahindra Thar — Overview
• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Type: Compact SUV with strong off-road capability.
• Drive: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) & 4-wheel drive (4WD) depending on variant.
• Fuel Types: Petrol & Diesel options available.
• Transmission: Manual & Automatic options.
Prices — India (2026)
Ex-Showroom Price (Indicative)
• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

coverage.

• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).

Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

• Body Style: 5-door SUV.
• Seating: 6- or 7-seater options.
• Engine Options:
o Petrol: 2.0 L turbo mStallion (~1997 cc) ~197 PS.
o Diesel: 2.2 L mHawk (~2184 cc) ~182 PS.
• Transmission:
o 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
• Drive Options: FWD standard; AWD optional on some diesel variants.
• Fuel Type: Petrol / Diesel.
Price (India) — Ex-Showroom
• Range (approx): ₹13.66 Lakh – ₹23.71 Lakh (Variant-wise ex-showroom).
o Base petrol/manual: ~₹13.66 L & up.
o Top diesel-AT/AWD: ~₹23.71 L.
• Variants: MX, AX3, AX5, AX7, AX7L (with petrol & diesel, manual & automatic options).
On-Road Price (City Examples)
On-road prices include RTO (registration), insurance, and statutory charges; they differ by city/state:
New Delhi
• Ex-Showroom (MX 7Str Petrol): ₹13.65 L.
• RTO: ~₹2.26 L (varies)
• Insurance: ~₹0.89 L
On-Road ≈ ₹16.8 L for base model.
EMI shown ≈ ₹26,000-₹33,000/mo (typical EMI varies by loan terms).
Chennai
• Base model ≈ ₹17.7 L (on-road).
Bangalore
• Base model ≈ ₹17.56 L (on-road).
(On-road pricing for other cities typically falls between ₹16 L – ₹27 L depending on variant and
regional taxes.)
Specifications
Engine & Performance
• Petrol: ~2.0 L turbo, ~197 PS, ~380 Nm torque.
• Diesel: ~2.2 L turbo, ~182 PS, ~450 Nm torque.
• Transmission: 6-speed Manual / 6-speed Automatic.
Mileage
• Petrol Manual: ~15 km/l.
• Petrol Automatic: ~13-14 km/l.
• Diesel Manual: ~17 km/l.
• Diesel Automatic: ~16.5 km/l.
Top Speed & Pickup
• Official figures vary by variant; typical SUVs with similar engines can reach ~180-200 km/h
top speed (manufacturer does not always publish exact top speed for every model).
• 0-100 km/h pickup is usually in the 8.5–10.5 sec range for petrol and ~9–11 sec for diesel
(third-party tests). (Exact figures vary by variant / test.)
Dimensions
• Length ~4695 mm
• Width ~1890 mm
• Height ~1755 mm
• Wheelbase ~2750 mm
Colour Options
Common colours offered (varies by variant & year):
• Everest White
• Stealth Black
• Valyrian Silver
• Deep Forest
• Burnt Sienna
• Midnight Black DT
…and a few special dual-tone options.
Features (Highlights)
• Level-2 ADAS safety (lane assist, adaptive cruise, etc.).
• 5-Star Global NCAP safety rating (tested configuration).
• Dual 10″ infotainment + digital cluster.
• Panoramic sunroof.
• 7 airbags (varies by variant).
• Quick-shift Torque Converter automatic option.
(Exact features differ by variant — mid-trim and top-trim get more tech & comfort features.
EMI / Financing
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate & tenure. Example (illustrative):
• On-road ~₹17 L, 10% down payment, 7.5-9.5% interest, 5-year tenure → EMI typically
₹30,000 – ₹38,000 per month (approx).
(Specific banks / offers change frequently.)
Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO/Registration Charges: Vary by state — metro cities are generally higher (e.g., Delhi
~₹2.26 L for base).
• Insurance: Depends on engine size, insurer, add-ons — typically ₹0.80 L – ₹1.20 L for new
SUV.
• Optional accessories, extended warranties, & cornering sensors add extra cost.
Key Takeaways

On-Road Price (Example) ₹16.8 L – ₹28.8 L (Delhi)
Mileage 13 – 17 km/l (fuel & transmission dependent)
Transmission 6-speed Manual / Auto
Fuel Petrol & Diesel
Features ADAS, digital displays, sunroof, 5★ safety
Mahindra Thar — Overview
• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Type: Compact SUV with strong off-road capability.
• Drive: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) & 4-wheel drive (4WD) depending on variant.
• Fuel Types: Petrol & Diesel options available.
• Transmission: Manual & Automatic options.
Prices — India (2026)
Ex-Showroom Price (Indicative)
• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)

Mahindra Thar — Overview
• Model: Mahindra Thar, India’s rugged lifestyle SUV from Mahindra & Mahindra.
• Body Type: Compact SUV with strong off-road capability.
• Drive: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) & 4-wheel drive (4WD) depending on variant.
• Fuel Types: Petrol & Diesel options available.
• Transmission: Manual & Automatic options.
Prices — India (2026)
Ex-Showroom Price (Indicative)
• Base Model: ~₹9.99 Lakh* (AXT RWD Diesel).
• Upper/Wider Variant: ~₹17.19 Lakh* (LXT 4WD Diesel AT).
*Prices vary by city/state and variant. These are approximate ex-showroom figure ranges.
On-Road Prices (Example Indian Cities)
(On-road = Ex-showroom + RTO/registration + insurance + other charges)
• Mumbai: ~₹11.78 L – ₹20.49 Lakh on-road approx.
• Ahmedabad: ~₹11.04 L – ₹19.16 Lakh on-road approx.
• Bangalore: ~₹11.99 L – ₹21.40 Lakh on-road approx.
• Delhi: ~₹11.19 L – ₹19.58 Lakh on-road approx.
• Other Metro Estimates: ~₹11.89 L – ₹20.23 Lakh (Delhi), ~₹12.03 L – ₹20.50 L (Mumbai), etc.
On-road prices depend on local RTO taxes, registration fees, insurance choices, and dealer handling
charges.
RTO / Registration & Insurance Notes
• RTO charges vary significantly by state and city (e.g., higher in metros). Typical RTO +
registration can add ~₹1.0 L – ₹2.0 L+ depending on the variant and city.
• Insurance premiums depend on the variant (engine size), add-ons (zero-depriciation,
consumables cover), and insurer — typically ₹40k to ₹1.2 L range; add-ons increase
coverage.
EMI (Financing)
EMI depends on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and tenure — typical example:
• Loan amount: ₹15 L (approx ex-showroom + on-road minus down payment).
• Tenure: 5 years.
• Interest: ~9% (approx).
• EMI estimate ≈ ₹28,000 – ₹37,000 / month (approx; can vary by lender).
(Exact EMIs change with interest rates & loan terms agreed with banks/finance houses.)
Specifications
Engine & Power Options
• Diesel: 1497 cc and 2184 cc engines.
• Petrol: 1997 cc engine.
• Transmission:
o 5-speed / 6-speed Manual
o 6-speed Automatic (Torque Converter)
Performance & Drive
• Drive Options: RWD and 4WD (4×4) variants.
• Ground Clearance: ~226 mm (high ride height suited to off-road).
• Seating: Generally 4-seater/4-door or 5-seater depending on body style.
Mileage / Fuel Economy
• ARAI claimed / typical estimates vary by engine & use: ~9 – 11 km/l in mixed conditions
(urban + highway).
• Real-world mileage may vary:
o Petrol ~7–10 km/l city, ~10–13 km/l highway.
o Diesel ~10–12 km/l city, ~12–14 km/l highway (owner-reported).
(Off-road driving or heavy usage reduces mileage.)
Features
Standard / common features across variants include:
• Safety: Dual airbags, ABS with EBD, hill-hold & descent control on higher variants.
• Infotainment: Touchscreen audio with Android Auto / Apple CarPlay.
• Interior: Comfortable seats, climate control, multifunction steering.
• Off-road Capabilities: Selectable 4WD (on 4×4 variants), electronic differential locks on some
trims.
• Wheels & Suspension: SUV-oriented suspensions with good approach & departure angles for
off-road utility.
Colour Options
Colours usually include a mix of solid and metallic finishes (subject to year/variant), examples:
• Galaxy Grey
• Pristine White
• Bold Red
• Deep Forest
• Aquamarine
• Dual-tone options on higher trims (may vary with year). (Exact colour palette depends on
variant and production batch.)
